mission.title: kubevirt: vm terminates when a hostdevice or gpu is passed with `name` that does not meet the libvirt hostdev alias format
mission.description: vm terminates when a hostdevice or gpu is passed with `name` that does not meet the libvirt hostdev alias format. Users encounter: "runtime error: invalid memory address or".

steps.title: Identify kubevirt troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your kubevirt deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt -n kubevirt --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference`

steps.title: Review kubevirt configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
kubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt
```
**What happened**:
Create a VM with a hostdevice or gpu device passed to the VM with a name containing a special character such as `.`

for example

```
          gpus:
          - deviceName: nvidia.com/GRID_A100-1-10C
            name:

steps.title: Apply the fix for vm terminates when a hostdevice or gpu is passed with…
steps.description:
Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:
```yaml
gpus:
          - deviceName: nvidia.com/GRID_A100-1-10C
            name: nvidia.com-grid-a100-1-10c
```

steps.title: Confirm vm terminates when a hostdevice or gpu is passed… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt -n kubevirt --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary: See the source issue for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/issues/16043
codeSnippets:
virt-launcher-gpu-znjb8 compute panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
virt-launcher-gpu-znjb8 compute [signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x8 pc=0x55c975ab617b]

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kubevirt installed or the issue environment reproducible.
